tree.description: Password reset journey which uses PingOne Verify to validate the user and allow them to reset their password

uiConfig.annotations: {"forNodes":{},"structural":[{"id":"264b385c-e259-4ce0-84c1-47562f98e9a4","text":"Normalize sharedState attributes, check if the user exists in PingOne and if not create an anonymized user","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":32,"y":942.7666625976562,"w":460,"h":149},{"id":"eed2af55-3fc8-4577-87d1-13ef37e3f5fa","text":"Call PingOne Verify to execute the identity Check","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":615,"y":101.76666259765625,"w":293,"h":100},{"id":"861bfc25-b857-45a9-934a-0d4e985f5778","text":"If verification succeeds allow the customer to reset their password with retry in case the password does not meet policy requirements","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":1215,"y":83.76666259765625,"w":486,"h":127},{"id":"8f09610a-860d-43ae-a27d-c70a825a517e","text":"Update front channel status","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":411,"y":100.76666259765625,"w":127,"h":100},{"id":"80bfb052-8b96-49da-bfd3-99f0d5718f9f","text":"Update front channel status","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":999,"y":104.76666259765625,"w":129,"h":100},{"id":"7b0e9932-60ba-42c6-b8db-0227883f1278","text":"Update front channel status","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":1712,"y":302.76666259765625,"w":131,"h":100},{"id":"1e62e69c-6617-4541-86c4-20958fe8f42f","text":"Update front channel status with failure status","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":803,"y":971.7666625976562,"w":200,"h":100}]}

scanQRCodeMessage.en: Please scan the QR code to commence the verification process.

d00133c4-64c1-4282-bd92-0f7a89510c04.journeyStatusValue: Beginning the user identity verification process

ec529927-5f2b-4446-a35d-6202bc2e2a83.journeyStatusValue: User identity verification process succeeded. Allowing user to reset their password.

79993f84-1487-4cc3-9eee-e6822635c161.message: Identity verification and password reset has been successfully completed.

2f0e8fab-56f7-4d9e-9b64-6a80d5a7db1e.message: Identity verification and password reset failed. Please try again..

tree.description:
Help desk operative journey to invoke a user driven back channel journey to reset password via credential validation using PingOneVerify
password

uiConfig.annotations: {"forNodes":{},"structural":[{"id":"3a57a9ae-460a-4a99-b5d6-137824f2f89d","text":"Help desk user login with role check to ensure only admins can execute this journey","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":141,"y":514.7666625976562,"w":500,"h":100},{"id":"694156fc-f352-4941-9b0d-7c4dd75d87a9","text":"Request the customer's email address, find the user and set user attributes in nodeState for Back Channel journey consumption","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":759,"y":101.76666259765625,"w":500,"h":148},{"id":"4b82f9b5-83ff-4a85-a55e-13432f1687cb","text":"Initialize the Back Channel user journey and send the user a magic link to validate ownership and enable user journey access","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":1779,"y":29.76666259765625,"w":500,"h":137},{"id":"4d911c63-7f13-484c-80ae-36db7743bfb1","text":"Poll the Back Channel Journey status and update this Front Channel journey to provide dynamic progress updates as the use journey advances","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":2345,"y":28.76666259765625,"w":500,"h":146},{"id":"90528ad1-f635-4cee-b20c-ee279ff8aafd","text":"On success display a completed message to the help desk operative and exit the journey","color":"yellow","createdBy":"Darinder Shokar","x":2607,"y":212.76666259765625,"w":349,"h":145}]}

34f7c0fa-3eca-4193-92de-feecc4bbaa98.message: User identity verification and password reset process successfully completed.

waitingMessage.en: Waiting for the user to click the identity verification magic link email.

0d4c2c3f-8e07-427d-8252-235b5f44042f.name: ds-front-channel-status-updater
0d4c2c3f-8e07-427d-8252-235b5f44042f.description: Updates the status message displayed by the Poll Wait Node as the back channel user journey progresses.

46c928e6-685d-433a-bd01-b68532d43557.name: ds-customer-send-magic-link
46c928e6-685d-433a-bd01-b68532d43557.description: Send a magic link to the user to initiate the back channel Verify journey in order to reset their password

7925d6be-f29c-4e33-8f2b-766e88664bb3.name: ds-get-customer-username
